_scoring_note: Keyword scoring is intentionally shallow -- it checks whether the response mentions key concepts.
_note: Javalin is a lightweight web framework for Java and Kotlin built on embedded Jetty. Key entry point is Javalin.create(). Core abstractions: Handler (functional interface for endpoints), Context (request/response wrapper), JavalinServlet (HttpServlet subclass that runs the request lifecycle), InternalRouter + PathMatcher (route matching), Plugin system for extensions. Supports HTTP, WebSocket, SSE, static files, and async via CompletableFuture. Multi-module Maven project: javalin (core), javalin-testtools, javalin-ssl, javalin-micrometer, javalin-utils.
